<!-- Thanks for contributing! Keep PRs small and focused — one skill or one fix per PR. -->

## What this changes

<!-- One or two lines. -->

## Type
- [ ] New skill
- [ ] Fix / improvement to an existing skill
- [ ] Docs / repo housekeeping

## Checklist (for skill changes)
- [ ] Repo-aware — reads real code and cites `file:line`; not generic advice
- [ ] Scored — ends in a 0–100 score, grade, and verdict (per [CONVENTIONS.md](../CONVENTIONS.md))
- [ ] Self-contained — works after being copied into `.claude/skills/`; no runtime dependence on repo-root files
- [ ] Frontmatter valid — `name` matches the folder; `description` leads with *when* to use it
- [ ] Doesn't duplicate an existing skill (or explains why it's distinct)
- [ ] README skills table updated (for a new skill)
- [ ] Tested against at least one real repo; score and findings look sane
